LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT & ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION - JUDGE MILLER IS RECUSED. No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation - Judge Miller is recused. Per Order of the Presiding Judge, this matter will be heard by Judge Kramer in Dept. 303. The parties are to meet and confer and contact the clerk at (415) 551-3726 to set the hearing date.
